parameters.jsCode:
const input=$input.first();const inputJson=input.json||{};const inputBinary=input.binary||{};let body;if(inputBinary.body){const buffer=await this.helpers.getBinaryDataBuffer(0,'body');body=JSON.parse(buffer.toString('utf8'));}else if(typeof inputJson.body==='string'){body=JSON.parse(inputJson.body);}else if(inputJson.body&&typeof inputJson.body==='object'){body=inputJson.body;}else{body=inputJson;}const request=body.request||{};const sessionDetails=request.sessionDetails||'';const moduleMatch=sessionDetails.match(/Module:\s*(.+?)(?: |$)/);const timeMatch=sessionDetails.match(/Preferred Time:\s*(.+?)(?: |$)/);const module_=moduleMatch?moduleMatch[1].trim():'N/A';const preferredTime=timeMatch?timeMatch[1].trim():'N/A';const ticketId=body.ticketId||'';const cardId=body.cardId||'';const responseToken=body.responseToken||'';const tutorEmail=body.tutor&&body.tutor.email?String(body.tutor.email).trim():'';const tutorName=body.tutor&&body.tutor.name?body.tutor.name:'Tutor';const learnerName=body.learner&&body.learner.name?body.learner.name:'N/A';const acceptUrl=body.callback?.acceptUrl||body.acceptUrl||'';const refuseUrl=body.callback?.refuseUrl||body.refuseUrl||'';const emailDeliveryCallback=body.emailDeliveryCallback||{};const dashboardUrl=body.dashboardUrl||body.ticket?.dashboardUrl||'https://technicalsupport.kentbusinesscollege.net/admin';function esc(value){return String(value??'N/A').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/'/g,''');}function bytes(value){const size=Number(value||0);if(!Number.isFinite(size)||size<=0)return '';if(size<1024)return `${size} B`;if(size<1024*1024)return `${Math.round(size/1024)} KB`;return `${(size/1024/1024).toFixed(1)} MB`;}function row(label,value){return `${esc(label)}${esc(value)}`;}function section(title){return `
${esc(title)}
`;}function box(rows,color){return `${rows}
`;}function normalizeFiles(files){return Array.isArray(files)?files.filter(Boolean).map(file=>({name:file.name||'attachment',mimeType:file.mimeType||'application/octet-stream',size:Number(file.size||0),dataUrl:file.dataUrl||'',downloadUrl:file.downloadUrl||'',deliveryMode:file.deliveryMode||'',deliveryReason:file.deliveryReason||''})):[];}function parseSessionsFromText(text){const sessions=[];const sessionsMatch=text.match(/Sessions: ([\s\S]+)/);if(sessionsMatch){const lines=sessionsMatch[1].trim().split(' ').filter(line=>line.trim());lines.forEach((line,index)=>{const clean=line.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/,'').trim();const parts=clean.split('|').map(part=>part.trim());sessions.push({label:`Session ${index+1}`,date:parts[0]||'N/A',number:parts[1]?parts[1].replace('No.','').trim():'N/A',subject:parts[2]||'N/A',files:[]});});return sessions;}const subjectMatch=text.match(/Session Subject:\s*(.+?)(?: |$)/);if(subjectMatch){sessions.push({label:'Session 1',date:'N/A',number:'N/A',subject:subjectMatch[1].trim(),files:[]});}return sessions;}function fileList(files){if(!files.length){return `No files attached specifically to this session.`;}return `Attachments${files.map(file=>{const sizeLabel=bytes(file.size);const fileLabel=`${file.name}${sizeLabel?` (${sizeLabel})`:''}`;const linkBadge=file.deliveryMode==='link'?' secure download link':'';if(file.downloadUrl){return `
${esc(fileLabel)}${linkBadge}
`;}return `
${esc(fileLabel)}
`;}).join('')}`;}const parsedSessions=parseSessionsFromText(sessionDetails);const structuredSessionFiles=Array.isArray(request.sessionFiles)?request.sessionFiles:[];const sessions=structuredSessionFiles.length>0?structuredSessionFiles.map((group,index)=>{const parsed=parsedSessions[index]||{};return {label:group.label||parsed.label||`Session ${index+1}`,date:group.date||parsed.date||'N/A',number:group.number||parsed.number||'N/A',subject:group.subject||parsed.subject||'N/A',files:normalizeFiles(group.attachments)};}):parsedSessions;const generalFiles=normalizeFiles(request.presentationFiles);const allStructuredFiles=[...generalFiles,...sessions.flatMap(session=>session.files)];const sessionCards=sessions.map(session=>`${row('Date',session.date)}${row('Session No. in Module',session.number)}${row('Subject',session.subject)}${fileList(session.files)}
 `).join('');const generalAttachmentsHtml=generalFiles.length>0?`${section('General Attachments')}${box(fileList(generalFiles),'#6d5dfc')}`:'';const tutorButtons=`
✓ Accept ✗ Refuse
`;function buildShell(title,intro,extraRows){return `${esc(title)}
KENT BUSINESS COLLEGE
${esc(title)}
${section('Request Info')}${box(row('Ticket ID',ticketId)+row('Tutor',`${tutorName} <${tutorEmail}>`)+row('Requested By',learnerName)+row('Module',module_)+row('Session Details',preferredTime),'#1a1a2e')}${generalAttachmentsHtml}${section('Sessions That Need To Be Covered')}${sessionCards||``}${extraRows}
${intro}
No sessions were provided.
`;}const emailHtml=buildShell('Coverage Session Request',`Dear ${esc(tutorName)}, you have received a coverage session request. Please review the details below and confirm your availability.`,tutorButtons);const internalEmailHtml=buildShell('Coverage Request Sent to Tutor','This is an internal notification. The tutor has received the action email separately.',`Open Ticket in DashboardAccept / Refuse buttons are only included in the tutor email, not in this internal copy.`);const FIXED_INTERNAL_RECIPIENTS=['Mohamed.Elmasry@kentbusinesscollege.com','Yousef.Sultan@kentbusinesscollege.com','Ayman.Badewi@kentbusinesscollege.com'];function uniqueEmailList(values){const seen=new Set();return values.map(value=>String(value||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).filter(email=>{const key=email.toLowerCase();if(key===tutorEmail.toLowerCase())return false;if(seen.has(key))return false;seen.add(key);return true;}).join(',');}const coachEmail=body.coach?.email||'';const requestedByEmail=body.requestedBy?.agentEmail||'';const ccList='';const internalRecipients=uniqueEmailList([coachEmail,requestedByEmail,...FIXED_INTERNAL_RECIPIENTS]);const binaryData={};for(const key of Object.keys(inputBinary)){if(key==='body')continue;binaryData[key]=inputBinary[key];}if(Object.keys(binaryData).length===0){for(let i=0;i0;const result={json:{tutorEmail,tutorName,ticketId,cardId,responseToken,ccList,internalRecipients,internalEmailSubject:`Coverage Request Sent - ${ticketId}`,internalEmailHtml,emailSubject:'Coverage Session Request',emailHtml,hasAttachments,emailDeliveryCallback}};if(hasAttachments){result.binary=binaryData;}return [result];

const prepared=$('Prepare Email Data').item.json||{};const gmailResult=$input.first().json||{};const callback=prepared.emailDeliveryCallback||{};const messageId=gmailResult.id||gmailResult.messageId||gmailResult.gmailMessageId||'';const threadId=gmailResult.threadId||gmailResult.gmailThreadId||'';const rawError=gmailResult.error||gmailResult.message||gmailResult.errorMessage||'';const errorMessage=typeof rawError==='string'?rawError:(rawError.message||rawError.description||JSON.stringify(rawError));const failed=Boolean(gmailResult.error)||(!messageId&&!threadId);return [{json:{ticketId:prepared.ticketId||callback.ticketId||'',cardId:prepared.cardId||callback.cardId||'',responseToken:prepared.responseToken||callback.responseToken||'',tutorEmail:prepared.tutorEmail||'',tutorName:prepared.tutorName||'',status:failed?'failed':'sent',messageId,threadId,error:failed?(errorMessage||'Gmail delivery failed'):'',emailDeliveryCallback:callback}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { ticketId: $json.ticketId, cardId: $json.cardId, responseToken: $json.responseToken, status: $json.status, messageId: $json.messageId, threadId: $json.threadId, error: $json.error, token: $json.emailDeliveryCallback.token } }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE tickets
SET tutor_emails = jsonb_set(
  COALESCE(tutor_emails, '{}'::jsonb),
  ARRAY[$2::text],
  jsonb_build_object(
    'gmail_message_id', $3::text,
    'gmail_thread_id',  $4::text,
    'sent_at',          to_jsonb(now())
  ),
  true
)
WHERE public_id = $1;
